sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 18.105 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.18)

statement.latex: Let$R$be the formal power series algebra in commuting indeterminates$x_1, x_n,$over the field with$p$elements, with$p$a prime. (Thus its elements are (in general infinite) linear combinations of monomials$x_1^{a_1} x_n^{a_n}$with$n, a_1, ,a_n$non-negative integers.) Let$I$be the maximal ideal of$R$and$J$the (abstract) ideal generated by all products of two elements of$I$. Is there an ideal$U$of$R$...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
